items.description: Reduce unnecessary rerenders in the popular threads box after the popular-thread algorithm finishes and the loaded list is stable until hard refresh.
verification: profile popular threads rerender behavior with react-scan
playwright-cli browser checks across Blink, Gecko, and WebKit
items.notes: Post-fix profile measured 0 React commits and no PopularThreadsBox/PopularThreadCard/CatalogPostMedia/ContentPreview rerenders in the 10s window after Popular Threads became visible.
